attacking_style: Not an attacker - pure sprinter who relies on final 200m power. Lacks positional awareness in chaotic bunch sprint finishes.
team_tactics: Limited observations suggest minimal leadout support; rider often left to navigate own positioning in compressed finales.
terrain_preference: Flat sprint stages suited to power; exposed in technical or positioning-dependent finishes where sprint awareness is critical.
vulnerability: Poor positioning awareness in compressed sprints; susceptible to late-race crashes that have derailed his opportunities.
key_patterns: Sprint positioning deficiencies evident in high-pressure finales (2 observations across Vuelta stages)
Crash vulnerability ending race/sprint opportunities, particularly late in stages (2 observations)
Strong raw sprint power undermined by tactical positioning errors in final kilometers
form_trajectory: negative: hospitalized from 2023 Vuelta crash after already showing positioning issues in 2022; pattern of sprint execution problems
built_from: 2022 La Vuelta ciclista a Espana Stage 3
2023 La Vuelta Ciclista a Espana Stage 4
